title: Selling Presets Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, and you can't use PayPal or Stripe to sell your presets because of their country restrictions. You've tried other platforms, but they either don't support your currency or require a buyer account. You're frustrated because you can't earn money from your work without jumping through hoops. You're not alone. Thousands of creators like you face similar challenges. You need a reliable and secure way to sell your presets without relying on these major payment processors. But which option actually works for you?
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal and Stripe are popular payment processors, but they come with limitations. They restrict certain countries, including Nigeria, from using their services. If you're based in Nigeria, you can't create a PayPal or Stripe account. Other platforms like Gumroad and Payhip claim to support international creators, but they still require a buyer account and often come with high fees. They're not the best option for you, especially when you consider the hassle and cost. Web3 Wallet Connect offers a seamless and streamlined solution. It connects directly to your wallet, allowing you to sell your presets without the need for a payment processor account. This means you can keep more of your earnings and avoid the fees associated with other platforms.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe explicitly exclude certain countries from using their services. This means that if you're based in Nigeria, you can't create a PayPal or Stripe account. Gumroad and Payhip may claim to support international creators, but their terms and conditions often include clauses that allow them to restrict access at any time. Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, is built on blockchain technology, which allows for global accessibility. You can connect your wallet and start selling your presets without worrying about country restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When you use PayPal or Stripe, you're often subject to high fees and slow payment processing times. These fees can eat into your earnings, leaving you with less money than you expected. Gumroad and Payhip may offer more competitive fees, but they still come with costs associated with their services. Web3 Wallet Connect is a flat-rate solution, with a one-time payment of $19.99 for the Web3 Wallet Connect plugin. This means you can keep more of your earnings and avoid the fees associated with other platforms. Payment processing times are also much faster, with transactions often happening in real-time.
You don't need a PayPal or Stripe account to sell your presets.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

PayPal and Stripe require you to manually handle transactions and deliver your presets to customers. This can be time-consuming and prone to errors. Gumroad and Payhip offer some level of automation, but their systems can still be clunky and difficult to use. Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, offers instant automated delivery, so you can focus on creating more content without worrying about the logistics of sales. This is especially useful if you're selling a high volume of presets, as it saves you time and effort.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator in Nigeria looking to sell your presets without relying on PayPal or Stripe, Web3 Wallet Connect is the best option. It's a flat-rate solution that connects directly to your wallet, allowing you to sell your presets without the need for a payment processor account. It's also a secure and reliable solution, with instant automated delivery and real-time payment processing. If you're looking for a hassle-free and cost-effective way to sell your presets, Web3 Wallet Connect is the way to go.
